case_title: CAL INTERPRETING & TRANSLATIONS, INC. VS. RAFAEL CRESPO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-21-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SONYA RAMA--INTERPRETER WITH CAL INTERPRETING. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RAFAEL CRESPO--OWNER.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
